events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Sir Ringo Starr, born Richard Starkey, the iconic drummer for The Beatles, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: Eighty-six years young! Sending out good vibrations to the legendary Ringo Starr today. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his unmistakable rhythm?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist and astrophysicist, Sir Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the incredible Sir Brian May! From stadium-rocking riffs to astrophysics, is there anything this man can't do?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, marks his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Jagger's Enduring Energy
angles.copy: Still got the moves at 83! Wishing a very happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched in 1981
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) made its debut on August 1, 1981, forever changing the music landscape with its first video, The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: The Day Video Ruled
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV launched and truly changed the game. 'Video Killed The Radio Star' was the first track played – ironic, isn't it? What was the first music video that blew your mind?

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, featuring classics like 'Supersonic' and 'Live Forever'.

angles.name: Definitely a Classic
angles.copy: Cast your mind back to '94! Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed British music forever. What's your go-to track from that iconic debut?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began in 1969
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, commenced on August 15, 1969, featuring acts like Jimi Hendrix and Janis Joplin.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. What an incredible moment in time!

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who died on August 16, 1977, at the age of 42.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering the one and only Elvis Presley today, on the anniversary of his passing. His music truly lives forever. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur was shot in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996, and tragically died from his injuries six days later, on September 13, 1996, at just 25 years old.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the immense talent of Tupac Shakur today. His impact on music and culture remains undeniable.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27.

angles.name: Guitar Hero Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix today. His revolutionary guitar playing continues to inspire generations. What's your favourite Hendrix riff?

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring the famous zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Walk Across History
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous of all time! Which track is on repeat for you?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon, still delivering those powerful vocals and sharp lyrics.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The distinctive voice of Oasis and a British rock icon, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad for Liam
angles.copy: You know the voice! Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite Oasis or solo track from the man himself?

events.title: John Lennon released Imagine
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic album 'Imagine' was released on September 9, 1971, with the powerful title track single following on October 11, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine The Impact
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon released 'Imagine', a song that still resonates globally. What does this timeless anthem mean to you?

events.title: Apple released the first iPod
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod on October 23, 2001, promising '1,000 songs in your pocket', and it began shipping on November 10, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: Remember life before the iPod? Twenty-five years ago, Apple launched a device that changed how we listen to music forever. What was the first album you loaded onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day celebrates the release of the very first James Bond film, 'Dr. No', on October 5, 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 007's cinematic debut with 'Dr. No' back in '62. What's your top Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, the iconic co-founder of The Beatles, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Enduring Spirit
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His message of peace and love continues to inspire.
